description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn and paved walkways. The structure features a dark gray gable roof with moderate overhangs and a central entrance flanked by symmetrical windows. The front yard includes small shrubs and a tree, while the rear side has a patio area with additional greenery. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted siding, and the windows are evenly spaced, providing a balanced appearance. The property is bordered by a concrete driveway and paths, with landscaping elements enhancing curb appeal. The overall design is simple yet inviting, suitable for suburban or residential neighborhood settings.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front and rear yards. Surrounded by paved walkways and greenery, it presents a balanced and inviting residential appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with shrubs and a tree.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the gable roof, side windows, and driveway leading to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a patio area, back windows, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Left-side view with visible side windows, lawn, and part of the driveway.
